channel.title: Agentic Literature Review on mwartell maladies
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic Literature Review on mwartell maladies

item.title: Is there prior art for the CDD concept
item.description:
I used a collaborative development session to find support for my claim of novelty. I find Response 3 interestingly because it asks the Agent to tell me how to better use the Agent.

date: 2026-03-13 title: cdd literature review current_head: f3ffc89f6b9983f31fdd3c141f30b740f0107f83 agent: Copilot Claude Opus 4.6 session_type: instructions: _cdd-instructions.md topics: []

cdd literature review

Prompt 1: find prior art related to CDD

Because I have not seen anything like it, I believe that the CDD concept is novel. Look at the collaborative-development-docs and cdd-revisited and then search the web for similar approaches to working with agentic AI in software development. Create an annotated bibliography of your results
